status_notes.todo: Ready — Rafa will pick this up
status_notes.in_progress: Rafa is currently working on this
status_notes.pending: Blocked or waiting — Rafa will skip this
status_notes.failed: Could not be completed — Rafa will skip this

owner_notes.human: Requires a human — Rafa will skip this
owner_notes.both: Either can do it — Rafa can pick it up

_schema.tdd_note: Optional boolean per task. true = Rafa uses red-green-refactor for this task regardless of global tdd.enabled setting. false = opt out even if tdd.enabled is true globally. Omit to inherit from rafa-config.json.

tasks.title: Initialize project structure
tasks.description: Create the basic folder structure: src/, tests/, docs/. Add a .gitignore that covers node_modules, .env, and OS files. Create a README.md with the project name as the title.

tasks.title: Set up linting config
tasks.description: Add ESLint with a sensible default config. Add a lint script to package.json if one exists. Run the linter and fix any auto-fixable issues.

tasks.title: Write initial test suite
tasks.description: Set up a testing framework (Jest or Vitest). Add at least one smoke test that passes. Add a test script to package.json.

tasks.title: Review architecture with team
tasks.description: Human task: schedule a review meeting to discuss the project architecture before further development begins.

tasks.title: Add CI workflow
tasks.description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow at .github/workflows/ci.yml. It should run on push and pull_request, install dependencies, run lint, and run tests.
